task_language: Pick the akita black bowl on the cookies box and place it on the plate
strategy_notes: Perception-isolated, multi-attempt exploration mode. Scene identified via image_cam_hi_00 + world_hi_00 + SAM3 segment: TWO akita black bowls (one on a small textured cookies-box at center ~(0.04, 0.005, 0.95), one on a tall dark cabinet at right ~(0.04, 0.21, 1.16)), the cookies box (center), AND two flat discs (the gray disc on a small pedestal at upper-middle ~(-0.37, -0.08, 0.92) and a pink/red-rim disc at bottom-left ~(0.03, -0.28, 0.91)). Key disambiguation: SAM3 'the dinner plate' scored 0.79 on the PINK-RIM disc — that is plate_1; the gray disc is glazed_rim_porcelain_ramekin_1 (ramekin, NOT the place target). The middle bowl on cookies_1 is 'the bowl on the cookies box'. Prior cell attempt (10 resets) had never tried middle-bowl→pink-rim plate with corrected coords AND a slow descent; the failed combinations had bad target coords (eef y was ~6cm off in att 7). Winning approach: (1) Pre-position eef high above the middle bowl at (0.04, 0.005, 1.05) with gripper open. (2) pi0_pick 'pick up the black bowl in front of you' max_chunks 22 — Pi0 picks the middle bowl (gripper tight ~0.004, lift ~0.05m). (3) Lift to z=1.15 with gripper:1 to clear obstacles. (4) move_pose to pre-place (0.055, -0.295, 1.05) gripper:1 — note move_pose REQUIRES gripper:1 or it OPENS and drops the bowl (cost one reset to confirm); also move_pose threads OSC singularities where move_to stalled completely (cost two resets to discover). The eef-x of 0.055 = plate_x (0.028) - measured dx offset (-0.024); eef-y of -0.295 = plate_y (-0.281) - dy offset (~ -0.014 effective drop). (5) Slow descent with move_pose to (0.055, -0.295, 0.95) step_clip 0.012 — bowl rests on plate's surface; release happens automatically when libero_terminated fires mid-descent (term=True at eef z=0.962). No explicit release needed because the predicate fired before the bowl was released.

pick_result.name: pick
pick_result.instruction: pick up the black bowl in front of you
pick_result.note: middle bowl on the cookies box (akita_black_bowl_*) picked cleanly from cookies_1; tight grip held throughout carry
